## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Monograph's upcoming "Monograph Method" campaign and strategize content creation to support it.](https://fathom.video/share/yfnNDZyQHJ6iG2vyxRzQGQQN_bbs9tV8?tab=summary&timestamp=80.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Monograph is launching a "Monograph Method" campaign in mid-November, focusing on educational content for A\&E firms](https://fathom.video/share/yfnNDZyQHJ6iG2vyxRzQGQQN_bbs9tV8?tab=summary&timestamp=80.0)
  - [GrowthX will support with SEO research and content creation, starting with 10 pieces (1 overview + 1 drill-down for each of 5 value props)](https://fathom.video/share/yfnNDZyQHJ6iG2vyxRzQGQQN_bbs9tV8?tab=summary&timestamp=1103.0)
  - [Future campaigns will focus on AI features, new pricing tier, and CRM launch in Q1](https://fathom.video/share/yfnNDZyQHJ6iG2vyxRzQGQQN_bbs9tV8?tab=summary&timestamp=1248.0)
  - [Product update blogs recommended for brand health and potential SEO benefits](https://fathom.video/share/yfnNDZyQHJ6iG2vyxRzQGQQN_bbs9tV8?tab=summary&timestamp=1533.0)

## Topics

### Monograph Method Campaign Overview

  - [Launch planned for mid-November (possibly pushed to Q1)](https://fathom.video/share/yfnNDZyQHJ6iG2vyxRzQGQQN_bbs9tV8?tab=summary&timestamp=80.0)
  - [Positioning Monograph as the operating system for A\&E firms](https://fathom.video/share/yfnNDZyQHJ6iG2vyxRzQGQQN_bbs9tV8?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Initial focus on top-of-funnel educational content](https://fathom.video/share/yfnNDZyQHJ6iG2vyxRzQGQQN_bbs9tV8?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)
  - [Main asset: Free email course](https://fathom.video/share/yfnNDZyQHJ6iG2vyxRzQGQQN_bbs9tV8?tab=summary&timestamp=974.0)
  - [Landing page with links to blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/yfnNDZyQHJ6iG2vyxRzQGQQN_bbs9tV8?tab=summary&timestamp=974.0)
  - [Long-term vision: Evolve into a comprehensive directory or microsite](https://fathom.video/share/yfnNDZyQHJ6iG2vyxRzQGQQN_bbs9tV8?tab=summary&timestamp=1094.0)

### Content Strategy and SEO Approach

  - [GrowthX to conduct research on pain points and keywords](https://fathom.video/share/yfnNDZyQHJ6iG2vyxRzQGQQN_bbs9tV8?tab=summary&timestamp=575.0)
  - [Initial scope: 10 pieces of content (1 overview + 1 drill-down per value prop)](https://fathom.video/share/yfnNDZyQHJ6iG2vyxRzQGQQN_bbs9tV8?tab=summary&timestamp=1103.0)
  - [Leverage AI and automation for efficient content creation](https://fathom.video/share/yfnNDZyQHJ6iG2vyxRzQGQQN_bbs9tV8?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Focus on answering real questions from authoritative A\&E forums](https://fathom.video/share/yfnNDZyQHJ6iG2vyxRzQGQQN_bbs9tV8?tab=summary&timestamp=580.0)
  - [Balance between educational content and product tie-ins](https://fathom.video/share/yfnNDZyQHJ6iG2vyxRzQGQQN_bbs9tV8?tab=summary&timestamp=496.0)

### Value Propositions and Content Topics

  - [Simplifying firm operations](https://fathom.video/share/yfnNDZyQHJ6iG2vyxRzQGQQN_bbs9tV8?tab=summary&timestamp=219.0)
  - [Connecting different firm operations](https://fathom.video/share/yfnNDZyQHJ6iG2vyxRzQGQQN_bbs9tV8?tab=summary&timestamp=219.0)
  - [Empowering teams and delegation](https://fathom.video/share/yfnNDZyQHJ6iG2vyxRzQGQQN_bbs9tV8?tab=summary&timestamp=219.0)
  - [Increasing financial transparency](https://fathom.video/share/yfnNDZyQHJ6iG2vyxRzQGQQN_bbs9tV8?tab=summary&timestamp=219.0)
  - [AI for architects (automating distractions)](https://fathom.video/share/yfnNDZyQHJ6iG2vyxRzQGQQN_bbs9tV8?tab=summary&timestamp=219.0)

### Future Campaign Plans

  - [AI features for architects](https://fathom.video/share/yfnNDZyQHJ6iG2vyxRzQGQQN_bbs9tV8?tab=summary&timestamp=1248.0)
  - [New pricing tier launch in Q1](https://fathom.video/share/yfnNDZyQHJ6iG2vyxRzQGQQN_bbs9tV8?tab=summary&timestamp=1248.0)
  - [New CRM feature introduction](https://fathom.video/share/yfnNDZyQHJ6iG2vyxRzQGQQN_bbs9tV8?tab=summary&timestamp=1248.0)

### Product Update Blogs

  - [Recommended for brand health and demonstrating active product development](https://fathom.video/share/yfnNDZyQHJ6iG2vyxRzQGQQN_bbs9tV8?tab=summary&timestamp=1533.0)
  - [Potential SEO benefits, especially for specific feature searches](https://fathom.video/share/yfnNDZyQHJ6iG2vyxRzQGQQN_bbs9tV8?tab=summary&timestamp=1629.0)
  - [Suggested distribution via social media, particularly X (Twitter)](https://fathom.video/share/yfnNDZyQHJ6iG2vyxRzQGQQN_bbs9tV8?tab=summary&timestamp=1765.0)
